id: Het groeigeweld van software as a service__a9-hybrid-small-to-big__0007
text: What do the key developments and performance data (metrics) in the Dutch SaaS landscape look like? We found out for you through interviews and our own survey among Dutch SaaS entrepreneurs.

metadata.chunk_id: Het groeigeweld van software as a service__a9-hybrid-small-to-big__0007
metadata.source_slug: Het groeigeweld van software as a service
metadata.author: Steven Peters
metadata.description: Software-as-a-service (SaaS) is a relatively new business model for software companies, in which software is sold as an online subscription service. For several years now, ABN AMRO has successfully gained experience in financing SaaS companies.
metadata.parent_text: What do the key developments and performance data (metrics) in the Dutch SaaS landscape look like? We found out for you through interviews and our own survey among Dutch SaaS entrepreneurs. We also spoke to venture capital firms that invest in SaaS companies. Entrepreneurs cite managing international growth as one of the main challenges. Venture capital firms focus on global scalability and international growth. They set high requirements for a SaaS company’s metrics. What do those requirements look like?

id: Het groeigeweld van software as a service__a9-hybrid-small-to-big__0014
text:
And what are the key metrics that Dutch entrepreneurs use to steer their company? In summary
Software developers benefit from strong demand for SaaS
Predictability makes SaaS a powerful business model
International growth is a key challenge according to entrepreneurs
More information.

metadata.description: Software-as-a-service (SaaS) is a relatively new business model for software companies, in which software is sold as an online subscription service. For several years now, ABN AMRO has successfully gained experience in financing SaaS companies.
metadata.parent_text:
And what are the key metrics that Dutch entrepreneurs use to steer their company? In summary
Software developers benefit from strong demand for SaaS
Predictability makes SaaS a powerful business model
International growth is a key challenge according to entrepreneurs
More information. Read the full report ‘The explosive growth of software-as-a-service’. Click here for more information about [Software-as-a-service financing](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/technologie/software-as-a-service-financiering.html).
[Software-as-a-service financing (27 September 2018). 2 MB](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/media/20180927%20Het%20groeigeweld%20van%20software-as-a-service_tcm16-70855.pdf)
Read more in the technology sector. Technology, Media & Telecom (TMT) is one of the fastest-growing sectors. Helped by the increasing use of software, algorithms and sensors, this sector is at the heart of the digital renewal of other sectors.
